candidates.label: Containment Off
candidates.description: Disable circulation rebound containment while keeping the current branch source-floor inheritance and weak-hemi boost.

candidates.label: Ported Floor
candidates.description: Disable containment and shift the cross-hemi floor / weak-hemi boost to a rollback-leaning circulation floor.

candidates.label: Ported Floor + Soft Containment
candidates.description: Keep the rollback-leaning floor while restoring only a lighter containment scale instead of the current branch damper.

decision.nextMove: Architecture A2 failed the bounded quick screen across every rollback-leaning port. Move to Architecture B: circulation-first partition rebuild.
